content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (Vol: 26.2%) with very narrow participation (Breadth: 2/8 sectors positive). Market environment: range-bound, risk-selective.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Construction & REIT showing strength led by TKFEN (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +16.11%) ABOVE TREND; Transportation is marginally positive driven by THYAO (1W: +0.95% | 1M: -4.86%) RECOVERY and TAVHL (1W: +0.68% | 1M: -7.97%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is the clear laggard: AKBNK (1W: -8.32% | 1M: -24.19%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -7.05% | 1M: -23.33%) BELOW TREND; Energy & Chemicals and Retail & Food also under pressure (TRALT (1W: -14.22% | 1M: -30.98%) BELOW TREND; SOKM (1W: -9.94% | 1M: -31.43%) BELOW TREND).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +16.11%) ABOVE TREND, KCHOL (1W: +3.52% | 1M: -6.58%) RECOVERY, SISE (1W: +3.42% | 1M: -2.07%) RECOVERY, OYAKC (1W: +2.42% | 1M: -6.17%) RECOVERY, MGROS (1W: +1.35% | 1M: -9.63%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TSKB (1W: -5.82% | 1M: -9.82%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -6.38% | 1M: -22.87%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -6.70% | 1M: -20.56%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -7.05% | 1M: -23.33%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -7.10% | 1M: -26.24%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
High-momentum movers: TKFEN (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +16.11%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: -14.22% | 1M: -30.98%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -11.41% | 1M: -22.49%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -9.94% | 1M: -31.43%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -8.32% | 1M: -24.19%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks remain weak and vindicated by heavy outflows; AKBNK (1W: -8.32% | 1M: -24.19%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -6.70% | 1M: -20.56%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -7.05% | 1M: -23.33%) BELOW TREND — avoid adding exposure until breadth and credit signals stabilize.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry and autos are under pressure but selective names show divergence: EREGL (1W: -4.88% | 1M: -15.88%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -11.18%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -3.08% | 1M: +9.39%) CORRECTION — watch ASELS for mean reversion after recent strength.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy paints a mixed picture with corrective action in majors: TUPRS (1W: -5.71% | 1M: +12.64%) CORRECTION, PETKM (quant upside but volatile) and TRALT (1W: -14.22% | 1M: -30.98%) BELOW TREND — trade with tight risk controls around oil/FX drivers.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
NEUTRAL posture: underweight banks and cyclical commodity-exposed names, trim size on losers and reallocate to tactical winners (TKFEN, selected transport names) while keeping dry powder for a confirmed breadth recovery. Keep stops tight and focus on idiosyncratic catalysts rather than market beta.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TKFEN (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +16.11%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, TUPRS (1W: -5.71% | 1M: +12.64%) CORRECTION for earnings/energy catalysts, AKBNK (1W: -8.32% | 1M: -24.19%) BELOW TREND for downside follow-through, SISE (1W: +3.42% | 1M: -2.07%) RECOVERY as a swing candidate.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for risk repricing and liquidity signals; Energy & Chemicals for oil/FX-driven volatility; Construction & REIT for momentum flows (TKFEN).

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to a near-term trading range break and volatility pick-up (Vol: 26.2%); key catalysts: CBRT communications, Q1 earnings, TRY moves and global risk sentiment — breaches of recent support or a pick-up in sector breadth will dictate next directional leg.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Market is NEUTRAL: normal volatility but very narrow participation (2/8 sectors positive). Tactical opportunity in TKFEN and selective transport/industrial recoveries, but systemic risk remains concentrated in banks and large energy/retail laggards — trade cautiously and size for idiosyncratic catalysts.
